sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Script Interpreter Execution From Suspicious Folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects a suspicious script execution in temporary folders or folders accessible by environment variables
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Script Execution From Temp Folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects a suspicious script executions from temporary folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Shadow Copies Deletion Using Operating Systems Utilities
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Shadow Copies deletion using operating systems utilities
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Michael Haag, Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community, Andreas Hunkeler (@Karneades)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Schedule Task Creation From Env Variable Or Potentially Suspicious Path Via Schtasks.EXE
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects Schtask creations that point to a suspicious folder or an environment variable often used by malware

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Potential Dropper Script Execution Via WScript/CScript
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects wscript/cscript executions of scripts located in user directories
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Margaritis Dimitrios (idea), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Potentially Suspicious Desktop Background Change Via Registry
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects registry value settings that would replace the user's desktop background.
This is a common technique used by malware to change the desktop background to a ransom note or other image.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Schtasks Schedule Type With High Privileges
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects scheduled task creations or modification to be run with high privileges on a suspicious schedule type
Detects the creation of scheduled tasks by user accounts via the "schtasks" utility.

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET MALWARE Wapack Labs Sinkhole DNS Reply
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert udp any 53 -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE Wapack Labs Sinkhole DNS Reply"; content:"|00 01 00 01|"; content:"|00 04 17 FD 2E 40|"; distance:4; within:6; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2021022; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2015_04_28, updated_at 2015_04_28;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET $HTTP_PORTS ( msg:"MALWARE-CNC Win.Ransomware.Sage variant outbound connection"; flow:to_server,established; http_header; content:"Host: mbfce24rgn65bx3g.",fast_pattern,nocase; metadata:impact_flag red,ruleset community; service:http; reference:url,www.virustotal.com/en/file/c1c31129a39441607c060a7da57855d3969cf47ce4119cda9beaf65b63faca60/analysis/; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:42059; rev:2; )

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows
